[{"title": "What means CeBIT? - AfterDawn", "url": "https://www.afterdawn.com/glossary/term.cfm/cebit", "snippet": "[DDG Snippet] CeBITstands for Centrum der B\u00fcro- und Informations technik. It is considered to be the world's largest computer expo and is held in Hannover, Germany each spring. It attracts up to700,000visitors each year, many journalists and countless PC and CE companies. It was originally founded in 1970 and has evolved into a giganticeventsince.", "relevance_score": 0.95}, {"title": "CeBIT Australia | Events | Booking Expo", "url": However, after being held twice (in 1996 and 1998), theCeBIThome 2000 that was planned to take place in Leipzig was canceled and the project was abandoned.", "relevance_score": 0.5}]
